title: ipomoea leiocalyx
intro: Ipomoea leiocalyx, also known as the 'corky morning glory', is a flowering plant species native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Studies have shown that Ipomoea leiocalyx may have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant, including tinctures and extracts, are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
